name: multi_organ_seg
description: AMOS CT multi-organ segmentation using a MaskSAM-trained nnU-Net v2 model (Dataset052_AMOS22_OnlyCT, 3d_fullres, fold 2, 16 classes). Accepts a 3D CT NIfTI volume and returns per-organ masks.

help.summary: AMOS CT multi-organ segmentation (16 classes) using MaskSAM-trained nnU-Net v2.
notes: Requires a 3D abdominal CT NIfTI volume.

runtime.notes: Requires GPU for nnU-Net v2 + MaskSAM sliding-window inference.
